After-Visit Summary — For Your Doctor

Personal reflection tool. Not medical advice.

Appearance

Light mode

Doctor Name Default

Pre-fills the doctor name field on new visits.

Data

About

After-Visit Capture Kit v1.0
Capture what you forgot to say, what the doctor said, and what to do next — within 5 minutes of walking out.

All data stored locally on your device. No data is sent anywhere.

All data stored locally on your device. Nothing is sent anywhere.
